prompt: Create a romantic watercolor-style anime illustration of a young woman with dark brown hair in a messy high bun tied with a pale ribbon standing in front of a quaint vintage French flower shop. She wears a cream floral puff-sleeve blouse with a gathered neckline and a high-waisted pale blue pleated skirt, with a delicate necklace, soft feminine posture, and her hands held behind her back. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in a warm brown skin-tone gradient, obscuring all facial features while leaving the hair, neck, outfit, and body visible. The setting is a sunlit, weathered plaster storefront with peeling paint, muted blue wooden trim, an open shop window full of potted flowers, glass bottles, shelves, and rustic decor. On the left wall is a translucent sign reading “fleuriste”, “depuis 1997”, and “fleurs. plantes. livraison. événements.”; inside the shop window, small handwritten text reads “bouquets”, “plantes”, “cadeaux”. Surround the entrance with baskets and pots of wildflowers in soft pink, white, yellow, and green. Use delicate hand-painted watercolor and gouache anime realism, soft natural daylight, warm beige and powder-blue palette, textured paper grain, loose painterly edges, gentle shadows, nostalgic European street atmosphere, vertical portrait composition, highly detailed flowers and fabric folds, no modern objects.
